package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerProfilingBenchmarkingMicrobenchmarkDeadCodeEliminated() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_microbenchmark_dead_code_eliminated"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Profiling and benchmarking. Flag benchmarks that do not consume results and may let the compiler remove work."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
